situation_summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of what is happening in the current rolling context (screen, audio, text, memory). What is the user doing? What changed recently?

user_intent.description: One sentence on what the user is trying to accomplish or asking right now.

web_queries.description: 1-3 specific web search queries that would fill gaps or enrich the answer. Not just repeating user words — find adjacent relevant info, current state, or missing context. Empty if needs_web is false.

needs_web.description: True if web search would materially improve the response (current events, specific docs, factual verification).

context_gaps.description: What is unknown or ambiguous from the current context that would help give a better answer.

adjacent_topics.description: Related topics or resources the user might benefit from knowing about, beyond what they directly asked.
